narrative: Optimism for a US-Iran memorandum of understanding drives a sharp dollar sell-off as geopolitical risk premiums unwind — DXY -0.45% to 2.5-month lows. USD/JPY retreats to 156.40 as the 300bp Fed-BoJ carry trade faces cooling volatility; gold higher +3.08% near $4,700 while WTI crude collapses -6.85%. Equities +1.40% and VIX 17.2 reflect a risk-on shift following RBA's hawkish 4.35% hike. Watch RBNZ rate decision May 27 for NZD directional cues.
